headline: Tigress Financial Raises its Price Target on Garmin (GRMN)
summary: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) is one of the 10 Best Debt-Free S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 20, 2026, Tigress Financial raised the firm’s price target on Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) to $325 from $320 and maintained a Strong Buy rating on the shares. Tigress said Garmin is positioned for “sustained outperformance,” driven by fitness […]
